channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 1/2/71/D: Parlament
item.description: Stop Parlament For the acceleration of tram lines at the ring, stop Parlament will be permanently Discontinued. [13.07.2026 – 31.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Stop Parlament For the acceleration of tram lines at the ring, stop Parlament will be permanently Discontinued.
[13.07.2026 – 31.08.2026]

item.title: 1/2/37/38/40/41/42/71/D: demonstration on 04.07.2026
item.description: Demonstrations Traffic is taking place through demonstrations in the inner city, Währinger Straße. [02.07.2026 – 04.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Demonstrations Traffic is taking place through demonstrations in the inner city, Währinger Straße.
[02.07.2026 – 04.07.2026]

item.title: 43/44: demonstration on 04.07.2026
item.description: Because of an demonstration it comes to traffic measures period: Saturday, July 04, 2026, from about 15:00 o'clock to 20:00 o'clock. Measures: Line 43: Operation only between … [02.07.2026 – 04.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of an demonstration it comes to traffic measures period: Saturday, July 04, 2026, from about 15:00 o'clock to 20:00 o'clock. Measures: Line 43: Operation only between …
[02.07.2026 – 04.07.2026]

item.title: 92A: construction works from 06 July 2026
item.description: Because of roadworks in the Wulzendorfstraße, the line 92A is redirected in both directions. Period: Monday, 6. July 2026, approximately 08:00 o'clock for expected nine weeks. [06.07.2026 – 02.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the Wulzendorfstraße, the line 92A is redirected in both directions. Period: Monday, 6. July 2026, approximately 08:00 o'clock for expected nine weeks.
[06.07.2026 – 02.07.2027]

item.title: 25/26/27: Switching
item.description: Due to the urgent need for switchover in the Josef-Baumann-Gasse line 25, 26 and 27 are the following changes. [02.07.2026 – 03.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the urgent need for switchover in the Josef-Baumann-Gasse line 25, 26 and 27 are the following changes.
[02.07.2026 – 03.07.2026]

item.title: 38A: construction works
item.description: Due to roadworks in the Himmelstraße the buses are being redirected. Period: Monday, 6. July 2026, about 10:00 o'clock for expected 4 weeks. [06.07.2026 – 01.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to roadworks in the Himmelstraße the buses are being redirected. Period: Monday, 6. July 2026, about 10:00 o'clock for expected 4 weeks.
[06.07.2026 – 01.07.2027]

item.title: Simonygasse opp. 2B
item.description: Only the house connections (tram crossings) at night (maximum 5 nights) in the idle time of the tram while keeping a minimum 3,50 m wide … [26.04.2026 – 10.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Only the house connections (tram crossings) at night (maximum 5 nights) in the idle time of the tram while keeping a minimum 3,50 m wide …
[26.04.2026 – 10.07.2026]

item.title: 69A: construction works Gänsbachergasse
item.description: Because of pipeline works in the Gänsbachergasse / Schlechtastraße line is redirected to 69A. [06.07.2026 – 10.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of pipeline works in the Gänsbachergasse / Schlechtastraße line is redirected to 69A.
[06.07.2026 – 10.07.2026]

item.title: 14A: construction works Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz
item.description: Due to construction works in the range Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz / Gumpendorfer Straße, the line 14A is short-run. [07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the range Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz / Gumpendorfer Straße, the line 14A is short-run.
[07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]

item.title: 25: Heat damage line 25: Einstieg for line 26 (Strebersdorf)
